description: Channel-level configuration for asset generation. All episode generators read this file before classifying scenes.

pinned_clips.description: Channel intro — figure walks toward cosmic swirls
pinned_clips.notes: Used in place of any generated video prompt when the voiceover says 'Welcome to Ruins Untold'. Copy this file into the episode's /videos/ directory as the assigned filename before running assemble.sh.

style_constants.lighting: golden hour sidelighting or deep chiaroscuro shadow

thumbnail.note: YouTube thumbnail. Must read clearly at 320x180 (suggested) and 168x94 (search). Extreme visual contrast required.

hero_visual.subject: archaeological site or artifact — dramatic, high-contrast, fills lower 80% of frame
hero_visual.composition: wide establishing or extreme close-up — never medium shot; thumbnails live or die on scale
hero_visual.framing: top 20% of frame intentionally left darker or blurred for text overlay — do not place subject there
hero_visual.depth: strong foreground subject with atmospheric background — layered depth reads at small sizes
hero_visual.lighting: golden hour sidelighting or deep chiaroscuro shadow — never flat, never uniform

text_overlay.style: distressed archival stamp or stencil — aged, weathered, institutional

branding.style: small distressed stamp, matching text treatment, 60% opacity
